response.global_analysis: Audio features a cover performance of 'Pesawat Kertas 365 Hari' followed by an Indonesian conversation between Airani Iofifteen and Fiametta Leo (Pia). The reference JSON mentions Reine, but on-screen text and character models confirm Fiametta Leo as the guest. Timing is strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset. Indonesian dialogue includes Japanese and English loanwords which are translated contextually.

subtitles.english: Come on, fly, try flying...
Come on, fly, try flying...
Come on, fly...
Try flying!
I got it!
Finally!
No! Finally!

subtitles.original: Akhirnya ya Pia, collab kecil-kecilan kita gak kecil, udah jadi besar guys.
subtitles.english: Finally, Pia, our small collab isn't small anymore, it's become big, guys.
Yay, finally!
Oh my god!

subtitles.original: Jadi ya terima kasih sudah mengundang saya Senpai.
subtitles.english: So yeah, thank you for inviting me, Senpai.

subtitles.original: Wih Senpai! Ya Senpai sudah ulang tahun yang keberapa Senpai?
subtitles.english: Wow, Senpai! So Senpai, which birthday is it now, Senpai?
Six!
But why haven't you graduated yet?

subtitles.original: Hush hush hush! Daripada gitu mending jikoshoukai dulu. Jiko jiko jiko!
subtitles.english: Hush hush hush! Instead of that, better do a self-introduction first. Intro intro intro!
Ahem... We are on fire!
A burning spirit that warms your days.

subtitles.original: Halo aku Fiametta Leo dari JKT48V Virtual Generasi Pertama. Halo semuanya!
subtitles.english: Hello, I'm Fiametta Leo from JKT48V Virtual First Generation. Hello everyone!
Wow, Pia!

subtitles.original: Oh my god yes! Gila kita pertama.
subtitles.english: Oh my god yes! Crazy, we're the first.

subtitles.original: By the way aku... aku nyadar sesuatu tau gak?
subtitles.english: By the way, I... I realized something, you know?
What?

subtitles.original: Hah! Sorry, so basically buat kalian yang bilang aku lebih pendek.
subtitles.english: Hah! Sorry, so basically for those of you who said I was shorter...
Now you guys see.
Hah, just a little bit.

subtitles.original: Hah! Dikit doang means everything to me you know.
subtitles.english: Hah! Just a little bit means everything to me, you know.
Means everything.
No no no no no.
How tall are you?
Uh, okay, let's just sit down.

subtitles.original: Yeah well for your information uh gak banyak kok, paling 18 centimeter.
subtitles.english: Yeah well, for your information, uh, it's not much, at most 18 centimeters.
But, but my feet don't reach.

subtitles.original: See? Oh my god guys, dia tuh emang...
subtitles.english: See? Oh my god guys, she really is...
Look at that, it's floating, dude.
Bro, floating for no reason.
My feet... my feet don't reach.

subtitles.original: Pia lucu banget. Pia tuh bedanya...
subtitles.english: Pia is so cute. Pia's difference is...
This! Me! This! Look! It doesn't reach!
It doesn't reach.

subtitles.original: Jadi ya itulah lagu ini ya.
subtitles.english: So yeah, that was that song.
By the way, the choreography is by Fritz-san.
I was told by Pia.
Pia taught me.

subtitles.original: Koh, wah hai, kore itu favorit banget gak sih?
subtitles.english: This, wow yes, isn't this like a total favorite?
Oh yeah.

subtitles.original: Coba one more gimana gimana? Gimmick?
subtitles.english: Try one more, how was it? The gimmick?
Ah! So cute! Kawaii!
Aih kawaii, so cute, right?
Guys, please don't judge me.

subtitles.original: Don't judge me. We're learning okay? We're learning.
subtitles.english: Don't judge me. We're learning, okay? We're learning.

subtitles.original: Ya learning. Jadi kalau ada yang apa apa apa ya ke Pia.
subtitles.english: Yes, learning. So if there's anything, just go to Pia.
It's not like that! Not like that!
Anyway, what is this?

subtitles.original: Karena kamu mau ke sini aku prepare ini.
subtitles.english: Because you were coming here, I prepared this.

subtitles.original: Really? Is this like for me?
subtitles.english: Really? Is this like for me?
Yes. Try it.

subtitles.original: Jiko jiko gimana? We are on fire!
subtitles.english: How's the intro? We are on fire!
I'm so honored, guys.
Hmm... smells like me.
Sorry sorry sorry.

subtitles.original: Jadi kalau kalian penasaran ini baunya Pia kayak gini guys.
subtitles.english: So if you're curious, this is what Pia smells like, guys.
Yes, the smell of charcoal. The smell of ash.

subtitles.original: Bau arang tuh bau gue cuy.
subtitles.english: The smell of charcoal is my smell, dude.

subtitles.original: Ih lucu banget tapi oh my god.
subtitles.english: It's so cute though, oh my god.
This is so cute.

subtitles.original: Hah! Iofi, aku suka banget kak.
subtitles.english: Hah! Iofi, I love it so much.

subtitles.original: Nggak mau pulang boleh nggak? Bawa pulang?
subtitles.english: Can I not go home? Take it home?

subtitles.original: Atau gue di sini, gue jadi tukang kabel juga nggak apa-apa deh.
subtitles.english: Or I'll stay here, I'll even be a cable tech, that's fine.
Are you serious?

subtitles.original: Tapi iya makasih ya untuk manajernya Pia sudah meminjamkan saya Pia.
subtitles.english: But yeah, thanks to Pia's manager for lending me Pia.
Thanks to the staff, M-chan thanks.

subtitles.original: Arigato. Iya oh my god I cannot really...
subtitles.english: Thanks. Yeah, oh my god I cannot really...

subtitles.original: Oh oshiku. Akhirnya aku bisa manggil kamu tau gak?
subtitles.english: Oh, my oshi. Finally I can call you, you know?

subtitles.original: Hah! Aku tuh guys waktu pertama kali dibilang aku mau invite kamu.
subtitles.english: Hah! You know guys, when I was first told I'm gonna invite you...
I was like... What?
Wah! I went to my manager like...

subtitles.original: Kalau bisa kupegang kayak wah gitu.
subtitles.english: If I could hold them, I'd be like "whoa".

subtitles.original: Wah! Aku diundang sama oshiku gitu.
subtitles.english: Whoa! I was invited by my oshi.
Yeah, like that, but yeah...

subtitles.original: Tapi aku walaupun excited harus pulang bro.
subtitles.english: But even though I'm excited, I have to go home, bro.
Oh yeah, that's right.

subtitles.original: Oh thank you for coming. Arigato.
subtitles.english: Oh, thank you for coming. Thank you.

subtitles.original: You know enjoy the rest of the show.
subtitles.english: You know, enjoy the rest of the show.
I will watch from there.
Okay, ready.
I'm going. Bye bye Pia!
Thank you! Thank you!
Yuhuu... Obisa!

subtitles.original: Kita sudah di penghujung acara nih guys.
subtitles.english: We're at the end of the show now, guys.

subtitles.original: Tapi sebelum kita ke akhir acara, aku akan berterima kasih dulu.
subtitles.english: But before we end the show, I want to say some thanks first.
Thank you for coming. Mwah!
Reine-sama thank you, Rika-sama thank you.

subtitles.english: Rio-kun also thank you, Pia also thank you.
